CustomField.formula: CASE(MONTH(End_Date__c), 1,TEXT(YEAR( End_Date__c )) +" Q4", 2,TEXT(YEAR(End_Date__c)+1) + " Q1", 3,TEXT(YEAR(End_Date__c)+1) + " Q1", 4,TEXT(YEAR(End_Date__c)+1) + " Q1", 5,TEXT(YEAR(End_Date__c)+1) + " Q2", 6,TEXT(YEAR(End_Date__c)+1) + " Q2", 7,TEXT(YEAR(End_Date__c)+1) + " Q2", 8,TEXT(YEAR(End_Date__c)+1) + " Q3", 9,TEXT(YEAR(End_Date__c)+1) + " Q3" , 10,TEXT(YEAR(End_Date__c)+1) + " Q3" , 11,TEXT(YEAR(End_Date__c)+1) + " Q4", 12,TEXT(YEAR(End_Date__c)+1) + " Q4", NULL)
CustomField.label: End Fiscal Qtr
